settings.text: Lower output than ground source and air-to-water
Free home visit or video call for needs analysis.
You receive a fixed quote within 24 hours.
We handle applications and permits where required.
Installation is carried out by our own authorized technicians.

settings.question: Does exhaust air suit my older house?
settings.answer: Exhaust air heat pumps require mechanical exhaust ventilation. We carry out a site visit and assess whether it works.

settings.question: Which heat pump suits my house?
settings.answer: It depends on the home's size, existing heating system and budget. Ground source and air-to-water suit homes with water-based systems, air-to-air suits direct electric heating. We offer a free needs analysis.

settings.question: How much can I save with a heat pump?
settings.answer: A house in the Stockholm area typically saves 40–70% of heating costs. Use our savings calculator for a quick estimate.

settings.question: Do I get ROT deduction on heat pump installation?
settings.answer: Yes, you get a 30% ROT deduction on the labour cost, up to 50,000 SEK per person per year. We deduct it directly from your invoice.

settings.heading: Exhaust Air Heat Pump in Stockholm
settings.intro: An exhaust air heat pump recovers heat from the air that is ventilated out of the house and uses it for heating and hot water. Most common in newer houses with mechanical exhaust ventilation.
settings.suitable_for: Newer houses and terraced houses with exhaust ventilation.
